title: Land & Development Process
subtitle: The MaxLife Development specialty — from raw dirt to ribbon cutting
description: Commercial development is where the biggest upside lives — and the biggest risks. This course walks through the complete development process: site selection, feasibility, entitlements, zoning, site planning, civil engineering, construction contracting, and project delivery. Based on MaxLife Development's live Florida projects.
outcomes: Evaluate raw land for commercial development feasibility
Navigate entitlements, rezoning, variances, and special exceptions
Understand site plan approval and construction documents
Build a development pro forma including hard costs, soft costs, and contingencies
Manage construction delivery and lender draw requests
